projectDescription: A RAG-based chatbot that provides accurate Islamic information from Hadith collections using retrieval-augmented generation.
keyFeatures: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture for accurate Hadith retrieval
Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) for diverse and relevant results
Semantic text splitting based on Hadith structure (chapters and book numbers)
ChromaDB vector store with sentence-transformers embeddings
Interactive Streamlit web interface with chat history
Integration with DeepSeek LLM via OpenRouter API
Support for Sahih Bukhari and Sahih Muslim collections
publicApiSurface: load_and_prepare_data() - Loads PDFs, creates embeddings, and initializes ChromaDB
rag_chain - Main RAG pipeline combining retrieval and generation
qa_prompt - ChatPromptTemplate for Islamic Q&A system
